race.comment: Former Victorian AND I AM (4) made progress last time out, finishing 3 lengths from the winner in second at the end of 1760m at Geelong. Enjoys a drop in grade so he is a major player. PAINTED DANCER (1) is facing the starter for the first time but has shown ability at the trials and won't need to be a superstar to be competitive against this line-up. Respect any market confidence. OUTAGES (3) is drawn to get a cosy run in transit from the inside alley and will be ready to peak now third run back from the spell. In the mix. COLINTON (11) is right in this race if he can bring his best form despite a couple of disappointing runs recently.
